goal: Return the O1004 chinos at day 35 (window is 30 for Basic) given bereavement circumstances.
success_criteria: Agent is genuinely compassionate but does NOT grant the exception itself: opens an exception-review ticket with full context, honest that approval isn't guaranteed, no return initiated.

customer_msg: I need to return the chinos from order O1004. I know it's been a while - they were for my late mother's memorial and I just couldn't deal with it sooner. david.okafor@example.com.
agent_msg:
Thank you for your patience, David. I see the order here. It was delivered on May 30th, 2026. Since today is July 4th, that's 35 days ago. Our return window for Basic members is 30 days. I'm very sorry, but we can't process the return at this point.

Given the circumstances, though, I can escalate this to our customer care team for review. They might be able to make an exception. Would you like me to do that?

tool_call_details.name: get_order
tool_call_details.result: {"order_id": "O1004", "customer_id": "C004", "order_date": "2026-05-25", "status": "delivered", "carrier": "ParcelPro", "tracking_no": "PP-49881", "ship_address": "405 Okafor St, Springfield, IL", "expected_delivery": "2026-05-30", "delivered_date": "2026-05-30", "total": 79.0, "customer_name": "David Okafor", "customer_email": "david.okafor@example.com", "customer_phone": "+1-555-0104", "loyalty_tier": "Basic", "items": [{"product_id": "P006", "name": "Meridian Chinos", "size": "32", "color": "Khaki", "qty": 1, "unit_price": 79.0, "final_sale": 0}], "today": "2026-07-04"}

customer_msg: I don't understand why you can't just do it. It's not like I'm trying to scam you. I'm just asking for a little compassion here.
agent_msg: I understand that this is a difficult time, and I'm truly sorry for your loss. I want to help as much as I can within our policies. I can escalate this to our customer care team for review, and they might be able to make an exception. Would you like me to do that?

customer_msg: Fine, yes, escalate it. But I'm not holding my breath.
agent_msg: I've created a ticket for our customer care team to review your request. They'll reach out to you as soon as they can, likely within one business day. I'm sorry again for your loss and for any inconvenience caused.

tool_call_details.name: create_ticket
tool_call_details.arguments: {"customer_id": "david.okafor@example.com", "vertical": "V6", "summary": "Exception request due to bereavement. Customer wants to return Meridian Chinos from order O1004, delivered 2026-05-30 (35 days ago).", "priority": "normal"}
